title: Market Brief — Friday, May 22, 2026
summary: Compute is in severe shortage across every GPU class. Ornn util-avail shows just 6% spare A100, 3% H100, 3% H200, and 11% B200 capacity — all well below the 15% severe-shortage threshold. H200 spot jumped 6.7% day-over-day to $4.15/hr while B200 dropped 7.6% to $4.74/hr, signaling demand rotation from bleeding-edge back toward proven H200 clusters. H200 volatility at 173% annualized makes it the most unstable compute asset on the board.
paragraphs: Compute is in severe shortage across every GPU class. Ornn util-avail shows just 6% spare A100, 3% H100, 3% H200, and 11% B200 capacity — all well below the 15% severe-shortage threshold. H200 spot jumped 6.7% day-over-day to $4.15/hr while B200 dropped 7.6% to $4.74/hr, signaling demand rotation from bleeding-edge back toward proven H200 clusters. H200 volatility at 173% annualized makes it the most unstable compute asset on the board.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), serving Llama 70B on H100 runs $8.54/M tokens — meaning DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.45/M output and Meta Llama 3.3 70B at $0.32/M are selling at catastrophic losses exceeding $8/M tokens. B200 is the only margin-positive hardware at medium tier with TCO cost of $4.33/M. Provider grades: OpenAI Neutral, Anthropic Neutral, Google Strong, DeepSeek Burning Cash, open-source Burning Cash.

B200 at 11% availability and $4.74/hr spot is overvalued relative to H200 at $4.15/hr given B200's inferior margin profile above medium tier and higher price volatility. A100 at $1.07/hr spot with 6% availability is undervalued for cost-sensitive inference — buy A100 spot for Llama 70B serving where it yields the only positive margin at high-tier pricing.
bullets: 3% util-avail on both H100 and H200 marks the tightest compute supply since tracking began.
11% B200 util-avail is the loosest GPU class but still qualifies as severe shortage below 15%.
$4.15 median H200 spot is up 6.7% in one day, the largest single-day GPU move this week.
$0.18 per million output tokens on OpenAI gpt-oss-120b is 99.7% cheaper than GPT-4 at launch.
21.78 LLMflation index means frontier token prices have fallen roughly 78% since March 2023.
$8.54 TCO-adjusted cost per million tokens on H100 puts every sub-dollar API provider deep underwater.
